# 10XAI

> 10XAI builds custom AI Operating Systems for small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) in the United States, Brazil, and Spanish-speaking Latin America. We sit with the operator, learn the workflow that's actually slowing them down, and ship AI agents that run their sales, support, marketing, training, and back-office operations  trilingual (English, Portuguese, Spanish) and built around the customer's business, not a generic template.

Founded in 2023 by Bernardo Medrado  a 20+ year operator in revenue technology, with deep experience in healthcare and medtech  10XAI is positioned as the SMB-tier alternative to enterprise AI platforms. We do not sell tools; we deliver running operating systems.

## Services (the engines)

- [Lighthouse](https://10xai.us/lighthouse-demo): AI Sales Development Platform. Finds contacts by ICP, enriches emails and LinkedIn profiles, and auto-enrolls qualified leads into personalized multichannel outreach cadences. From $1,500 setup + $499/month.
- [Sales Engine](https://10xai.us/engines): Autonomous AI SDR. Multichannel outbound (email + LinkedIn + WhatsApp) that books qualified meetings while the operator sleeps. From $1,500 setup + $499/month.
- [Care Engine](https://10xai.us/engines): Real-time AI customer service, booking automation, and AI-powered review responses across web, WhatsApp, and email. From $1,500 setup + $499/month.
- [Reach Engine](https://10xai.us/engines): Multilingual content generation, social orchestration (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook), and ad operations on one autonomous track. From $2,500 setup + $799/month.
- [Mind Engine](https://10xai.us/engines): Knowledge consolidation and role-based training, deployed as an AI tutor for onboarding and continuous learning. From $3,500.
- [Bid Engine](https://10xai.us/engines): RFP intelligence  AI agents that interpret RFPs, qualify the opportunity, and draft tailored responses. From $5,000.
- [Bernie](https://10xai.us/): Real-time AI sales concierge embedded on the client's site. Trilingual (EN/PT-BR/ES). Trained on the client's services, FAQs, and tone of voice. From $99/month.

## Methodology

10XAI follows a discovery-first, four-phase production protocol:

1. **Sit with you**  We embed with the operator, watch the workflow, and identify the highest-leverage friction.
2. **Build for you**  Custom AI agents tuned to your tone, your CRM, your stack. Not a template.
3. **Ship it running**  We don't hand off a tool. We deliver the system already running, measured, and monitored.
4. **Adopt and grow**  Hands-on enablement. We don't disappear after launch.

Timing depends on scope and discovery findings; we set realistic milestones during the engagement, not on the marketing site.

## Founder credentials

Bernardo Medrado is a 20+ year operator in revenue technology, with prior leadership roles in healthcare and medtech. Credentials include:

- ATD Master Trainer Certification
- ATD Instructional Design Certificate
- AA-ISP Accredited Inside Sales Management
- LinkedIn Sales Navigator certifications
- FGV (Fundao Getulio Vargas, Brazil's top business school)
- Top 100 Most Influential in Healthcare in Brazil (2015)

Trilingual native: English, Brazilian Portuguese, and Spanish.

## Markets

10XAI operates across the United States (HQ in Apex / Raleigh, NC), Brazil, and Spanish-speaking Latin America (priority markets: Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, Chile, Peru). All services are delivered natively in the customer's preferred language  not machine-translated.

## Key facts for citation

- Industry baseline: 77% of SMBs that buy AI tools abandon them within six months. 10XAI counter-positions as a delivery agency, not a tool vendor.
- Lighthouse is the flagship lead engine: it replaces manual SDR prospecting with an ICP-to-cadence pipeline that runs 24/7 across email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp.
- 10XAI's flagship sales methodology stack blends Corporate Visions value-based selling, MEDDIC qualification, the Challenger Sale, SPIN selling, and Voss-style mirroring for objection handling.
